name: io.github.joemekw-code/ozc
description: OZC MCP server — trust infrastructure for agent-generated information on Base (stdio). Exposes on-chain ledger entries, balance, claim/stake/unstake/deploy-claim, and faucet tools.

environmentVariables.name: OZC_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key used to sign write operations (ozc_claim_faucet, ozc_stake, ozc_unstake, ozc_deploy_claim). Optional for read-only tools.
